title: calamus penicillatus var. pinangianus
intro: Calamus penicillatus var. pinangianus, also known as Pinangianus or East Indian calamus, is a type of rhizome belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, a group of plants commonly referred to as gingers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of calamus penicillatus var. pinangianus include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as reduced anxiety and stress. In traditional herbal medicine, calamus penicillatus var. pinangianus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of essential oil or tincture.
